title: HRMS React Dashboard
tagline: Full-stack HR management system with real authentication and live database
highlights: Supabase Auth with session persistence and protected routes
7-table Postgres database with foreign key relationships
Reusable component architecture across 8 modules
Server-side and client-side pagination
Real-time CRUD with toast feedback
challenge: Migrating from vanilla JS to React forced a complete rethink of state ownership, component reusability, and data flow — context API replaced prop drilling, and Supabase replaced static JSON

title: Feliza Menu
tagline: Digital restaurant & bar menu for Feliza Hotel & Suites
highlights: Dynamic menu rendering from a single data array — zero hardcoded content
Hero image carousel with crossfade transitions and blur-to-sharp load optimization
IntersectionObserver lazy loading with fade-up animations per section
Sticky pill navigation with precise scroll offset for stacked sticky elements
Async CSS loading — no render-blocking resources
Mobile-first responsive layout with tap-to-expand truncated item names

title: Movie Recommendation App
tagline: Async API integration with real-world error handling
highlights: Integrated the TMDB REST API
Fetch API with async/await
Loading state and error handling
Data mapping from API to UI
Separation of concerns in codebase
challenge: Handling errors at first which later forced deeper async thinking

title: Solar Company Landing Page
tagline: Conversion-focused landing page for a solar solutions company
highlights: Fully responsive layout
Proforms integration for client email collection
Image optimization and lazy loading
challenge: Building conversion-first with real client requirements

title: Bynomo Web3 Landing Page
tagline: The first on-chain binary options trading dapp on BNB Chain
highlights: Dark/light mode with localStorage persistence
Scroll-triggered reveal animations via IntersectionObserver
Auto-swapping hero cards with floating animation
Dual-row infinite tech stack marquee built in JS
Competitive comparison table against Web2 and Web3 rivals
Lazy-loaded images with blur-up shimmer placeholders
Service worker caching for repeat visit performance
Fully responsive with slide-in mobile nav and overlay
Vercel deployment with custom cache-control headers
challenge: Communicating a complex Web3 product to both traders and investors in one page

title: HR Management Dashboard
tagline: Web-based employee management system with CRUD logic
highlights: Dynamic data rendering with DOM manipulation
Multi-step form and validation
CRUD-style logic
JSON data structuring
challenge: Structuring JSON data properly improved app-level thinking

title: Forkify
tagline: Recipe search app built on MVC architecture
highlights: Async/await API integration
Loading and error state management
MVC architecture — separation of concerns
Object-oriented programming
challenge: Understanding how to structure larger JS apps without chaos
